# SaaslyVet

> SaaslyVet is a web-based SaaS for managing small and medium veterinary clinics. It centralizes scheduling, clinical records, inventory, and billing in a single platform, with automated WhatsApp reminders. Built for Spanish-speaking clinics in Mexico (es-MX).

- Website: https://www.saaslyvet.com
- Language: Spanish (es-MX)
- Country: Mexico
- Category: Veterinary practice/clinic management software (B2B SaaS)
- Business model: SaaS subscription, billed monthly or annually in MXN; 14-day free trial, no card required, cancel anytime
- Status: Early access — actively developed together with the clinics that use it
- Audience: Independent veterinarians and small-to-medium veterinary clinics

## Core features

- Online appointment scheduling with per-veterinarian views and automatic WhatsApp confirmations and reminders
- Unified digital clinical record per patient (SOAP notes, prescriptions, vaccines, weight, diagnostic images, attachments, history)
- Inventory that auto-deducts stock with each treatment, plus low-stock and expiry alerts
- Fast billing / point of sale with multiple payment methods and end-of-day cash close
- Automated WhatsApp reminders (appointment confirmations, vaccine reminders, post-consultation follow-ups, inactive-patient recovery)
- Reports and analytics (revenue, top-selling products, occupancy, client retention)
- Role-based access control (veterinarian, reception, administration)
